checks.reason: The node is scoped to Roman quinaria/ajutage allotment gauges associated with late Republican or early Imperial water administration, not a broad 300 BCE metering technology.
Frontinus describes pipe bores, quinariae, delivery tanks, and records rather than weighing scales.
Pipe-bore allotment gauges require a distribution network and delivery tanks.
Official records support allotment administration but are not the physical gauge component.
